'''ngajaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dobber|dobber]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-j-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dobber|dobber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngajaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæjæbæth|ngæjæbæth]] || [[word:ngæjæbæj|ngæjæbæj]] || [[word:ngæjæbæsh|ngæjæbæsh]] || [[word:ngæjæbæ|ngæjæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngajajabath|ngajajabath]] || [[word:ngajajabaj|ngajajabaj]] || [[word:ngajajabash|ngajajabash]] || [[word:ngajajaba|ngajajaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngajabath|ngajabath]] || [[word:ngajabaj|ngajabaj]] || [[word:ngajabash|ngajabash]] || [[word:ngajaba|ngajaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngajafbath|ngajafbath]] || [[word:ngajafbaj|ngajafbaj]] || [[word:ngajafbash|ngajafbash]] || [[word:ngajafbaf|ngajafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngajabatha|ngajabatha]] || [[word:ngajabaja|ngajabaja]] || [[word:ngajabasha|ngajabasha]] || [[word:ngajabaka|ngajabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngajabath|ngajabath]] || [[word:ngajabaj|ngajabaj]] || [[word:ngajabash|ngajabash]] || [[word:ngajaba|ngajaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngajabathal|ngajabathal]] || [[word:ngajabajal|ngajabajal]] || [[word:ngajabashal|ngajabashal]] || [[word:ngajabakal|ngajabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngajabathatha|ngajabathatha]] || [[word:ngajabajaja|ngajabajaja]] || [[word:ngajabashasha|ngajabashasha]] || [[word:ngajabaka|ngajabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngajabathan|ngajabathan]] || [[word:ngajabajan|ngajabajan]] || [[word:ngajabashan|ngajabashan]] || [[word:ngajabakan|ngajabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngajabathaoro|ngajabathaoro]] || [[word:ngajabajaoro|ngajabajaoro]] || [[word:ngajabashaoro|ngajabashaoro]] || [[word:ngajabakaoro|ngajabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
